contents: As of June 26, 2011, there have been 550 foreign private contractor deaths in Iraq as part of the Iraq war. Of those, 257 are Americans and 59 Britons.[2][3] 225 of those killed were private military contractors or PMC's.  我们可能看的不是一个wiki哦~不过乃既然说了见不得光的行动了，那我没办法了哦，但按乃的四舍五入制，这么算都是接近零伤亡呀，更何况我也没说零伤亡哦
